title: Track C — Truth-in-Advertising

principles: Tool-first determinism (capability surface must equal advertised surface)
Operator observability (the system must explain its own state)
Plan-first execution with strict per-phase gates
anti_alignment: Mutation fence on actual write actions stays on
Risk-tier classification per agent stays unchanged
Two-phase confirmation gate for high-risk mutations stays on

user_stated_requirements: Execute Track C per master plan.
intent_capture.intent_verification: Tasks T1..T5 drive each parent-phase plan to completion.

current_state: Track C parent-phase plans defined; status draft; no execution started.
target_state: All Track C parent-phase plans status: complete; branch feat/m365-cps-trkC merged.

file_denylist: Any file not in allowlist of the active child-phase plan

requirements.description: Track C requirement carry-through from master plan R6.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: All parent phases satisfying master R6 are complete.

requirements.description: Track C requirement carry-through from master plan R7.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: All parent phases satisfying master R7 are complete.

requirements.description: Track C requirement carry-through from master plan R8.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: All parent phases satisfying master R8 are complete.

tasks.name: Coverage-Status Contract
tasks.description: Define coverage_status enum + schema; add not_yet_implemented to runtime status code enum.
exit_criteria: plan:m365-cps-trkC-p1-coverage-status-contract GATE green; commit + push to feat/m365-cps-trkC

tasks.name: agents.yaml Schema Upgrade
tasks.description: Add coverage_status to agents.yaml entries; migrate existing data; update validate_agent_action and execute_m365_action.
exit_criteria: plan:m365-cps-trkC-p2-agents-yaml-schema GATE green; commit + push to feat/m365-cps-trkC

tasks.name: MCP Tool Docstring Alignment
tasks.description: Audit + update MCP tool docstrings to mark every action with its coverage_status. Add linter.
exit_criteria: plan:m365-cps-trkC-p3-mcp-tool-docstrings GATE green; commit + push to feat/m365-cps-trkC

tasks.name: Operator Capability Map
tasks.description: Auto-generate operator-facing capability map doc from registry + agents.yaml. Mirror to UCP docs.
exit_criteria: plan:m365-cps-trkC-p4-operator-capability-map GATE green; commit + push to feat/m365-cps-trkC

tasks.name: Track C End-to-End
tasks.description: Live e2e of planned vs implemented action behavior; docstring linter green; governance closure.
exit_criteria: plan:m365-cps-trkC-p5-end-to-end GATE green; commit + push to feat/m365-cps-trkC

no_go_triggers: Any parent-phase plan in Track C fails its GATE
Branch feat/m365-cps-trkC merge conflict that cannot be resolved without scope drift

items.risk: Track C parent phase scope creep

agent_constraints: Do not touch files outside Section 5 file allowlist.
Do not skip or reorder tasks (Section 7 strict ordering).
Do not modify thresholds or invariants to make gates green without owner approval.
Do not execute until plan status is approved.
Reference plan:{plan-id}:{task-id} in all action log entries and commits.
Do not add tasks, gates, or deliverables not in this plan without owner approval.
Call validate_action MCP tool before any write operation (UCP server).
Each child phase commits locally; no push until parent-phase GATE is green.
Each parent-phase GATE pushes to feat/m365-cps-trk{X} branch only.
Each track GATE merges to development (UCP) and main (M365) only after live tenant smoke green.
